note: One-off fetch provenance for the g8 mathlib-1000 sample. The deterministic phase (extract.mjs) never touches the network; it reads source-snapshot/*.html.gz only. mathlib4_docs URLs are NOT versioned (daily build rotates in place), so source-snapshot/ is the archival byte copy; sha256_raw_html pins the pre-gzip bytes; the mathlib commit embedded in every record gh_link pins the content version.
fetchedBy: kern/opus-runner (g8 material-generation ops); python http.client, throttled 0.2s, niced
